name: GREX
description: GREX is an AI-powered personal trainer app that creates personalized daily workout plans, tracks progress, and provides real-time coaching. Available as a mobile app with a 3-day free trial.

products.name: GREX App
products.description: AI personal trainer that generates customized workout plans based on your goals, experience level, and available equipment. Includes exercise demonstrations, progress tracking, and an AI coach that answers fitness questions instantly.

keyFeatures: Workout plans adapt to available equipment
Plans for all fitness levels from beginner to advanced
targetAudience: Men and women looking to build muscle, lose fat, or improve fitness with structured AI-guided training
